title: SQL: conversion from decimal to varchar error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value Decimal(10, 5)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, CAST(value AS String) FROM test_table WHERE value > 10.0;
CREATE TABLE another_table (description String, amount Decimal(10, 2)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY description;
INSERT INTO another_table (description, amount) VALUES ('Test', NULL);
key_bug_features: casting decimal to varchar in SQL query
